{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kamba Nomen
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kamba Nomen]] is a short, dark-skinned [[Reader]] who lays curses for hire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kamba Nomen]] is a target who was assassinated by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
